title: Italian Lentil Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Italian-inspired stir fry made with lentils, vegetables, and a hint of Italian seasoning.

ingredients.name: crispy
ingredients.amount: 2 cups mixed vegetables ( bell peppers, carrots, broccoli)

instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the lentils, oregano, and vinegar. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
